description: From the Publisher How AI Truly Functions The functioning of ChatGPT and key artificial intelligence algorithms. Self-driving cars. The use of robots in warfare and industry. Quantum computing, generative AI, and superintelligence. The Development of AI The evolution of AI from its inception to the present day: early progress during the Cold War, the dot-com boom, and the Great Financial Crisis. The competition between China and the United States. The impact of the economy and geopolitics on the development of AI. AI and the Future of Humanity The implications of AI for our species: how are we evolving into a new species at the intersection of silicon and carbon through technologies like brain-computer interfaces, cyborgs, and DNA modification via AI-powered synthetic biology? The impact of these changes on our future: will AI lead to our extinction, or elevate humanity to new heights? Steering AI for the Benefit of All How will it reshape our society? Ultimately, what should each of us do to maximize its benefits while minimizing its potential dystopian outcomes? What should we ask our leaders to prepare for the inevitable advancement of AI?
